acceptance_criteria.criterion: withLock acquires and releases the lock correctly (test with concurrent access simulation)
atomicWriteJson produces correctly formatted JSON and cleans up temp files
readRootIndex returns validated data matching the Zod schema
readWorkPackage returns validated data matching the Zod schema
updateWorkPackageWithSync updates both files atomically within a single lock
Descriptive errors are thrown for missing files, malformed JSON, and validation failures

summary: Implemented src/storage/file-lock.ts with proper-lockfile wrapper and withLock helper
Implemented src/storage/ledger-store.ts with complete read/write abstraction
Added path helpers, existence checks, and comprehensive error handling
Implemented critical updateWorkPackageWithSync method for atomic dual-file updates
Verified all operations with comprehensive integration tests

comments.note: No observations — storage layer implements exactly the patterns specified in the plan. The withLock + updateWorkPackageWithSync combination ensures atomic dual-file updates, eliminating the desync bugs that motivated this project. Error messages include file paths and specific failure reasons.

summary: Verified withLock acquires and releases locks correctly
Tested LedgerStore.readRootIndex with valid and invalid JSON
Tested LedgerStore.readWorkPackage with valid and malformed data
Verified updateWorkPackageWithSync updates both files atomically within single lock
Confirmed proper error messages for missing files, malformed JSON, and validation failures
Validated all path operations use path.join (no path traversal vulnerabilities)
Confirmed temp file cleanup on error
